UnitAbilities.Title: The Warmaster
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one Warmaster ability (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Destiny
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting leadership roll, if the result of that roll was 7+, you gain 1CP.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

Sections.Title: Paragon of Hatred (Aura):
Sections.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Damned units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Sections.Title: Mark of Chaos Ascendant (Aura):
Sections.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry or Heretic Astartes Mounted unit (excluding Damned units) is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Sections.Title: Lord of the Traitor Legions (Aura):
Sections.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Damned units) is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Leadership and Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Head Taker
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6 for each model in this model’s unit which is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Herald of the Apocalypse (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if that enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test. This ability cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

Weapons.Name: Helspear
Weapons.Keywords: EXTRA ATTACKS, LANCE, SUSTAINED HITS D3

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Badab (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Damned units) is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hamadrya’s Knowledge (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

UnitAbilities.Title: Choice Samples
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit’s Garreon the Corpsemaster is on the battlefield, in your Command phase, select one of the following: you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to this unit, or, if one or more Heretic Astartes Infantry units from your army are below Starting Strength and within 3" of this unit, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fleet Command
UnitAbilities.Text: After both players have deployed their armies, if this unit is on the battlefield (or any Transport it is embarked within is on the battlefield) select up to three Heretic Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Plunder
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of it and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

LeaderInfo.Description:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one of the following units. This unit then counts as part of that unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

This unit cannot join an Attached unit, and only Huron Blackheart can join a unit this unit has joined.

StatLines.StatName: GARLON SOULEATER, GARREON THE CORPSEMASTER, KATAR GARRIX

UnitAbilities.Title: Trophy Takers
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this unit destroys an enemy unit, until the end of the battle, while this unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Legionaries unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brutal Raider
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristics of those weapons by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Raider’s Due
UnitAbilities.Text:
When this unit declares a charge, if an enemy unit within range of an objective is within 12" of this unit, you can use this ability. If you do:
▪ This unit can re-roll that charge roll.
▪ This unit must end that charge move engaged with one or more of those enemy units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Blessing (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in that unit, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ascended Daemon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model shoot or fights, while resolving those attacks, you can re-roll one Hit roll and you can re-roll one Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry unit, this model has Lone Operative.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Khorne:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of its hellforged weapons.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its infernal cannon.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Nurgle:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to its Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to its Move characteristic.

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Heretic Astartes Daemon Prince with Wings

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

UnitAbilities.Title: Flying Horror
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal or Advance move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Khorne:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Khorne keyword, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of its hellforged weapons.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Tzeentch keyword, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its infernal cannon.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Nurgle:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Nurgle keyword, add 1 to its Toughness characteristic.

Sections.Title: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh:
Sections.Text: If this model has the Slaanesh keyword, add 2" to its Move characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enhanced Warriors
UnitAbilities.Text: If this unit is attached to a unit at the start of the battle, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Bodyguard models in that unit and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of Bodyguard models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Surgeon Acolyte
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, if this unit contains Fabius Bile, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chirurgeon
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this unit’s Fabius Bile model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set it back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with its full wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Agent of Discord (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of this model with a stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Guns Blazing
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponnent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly Heretic Astartes unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonkin (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacrificial Dagger
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per phase, when this model is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, this model’s unit suffers 1 mortal wound and, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chance for Glory
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength, Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Formidably Resilient
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prescience (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Chaos (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, after resolving its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that had the [PSYCHIC] ability. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Familiar
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic to 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warptime (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Hex (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, one Psyker with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to that Psyker and roll one D6: on a 1, that Psyker’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time an attack targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Corrupt Machine Spirits
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one visible enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spirit Thief
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one visible enemy Vehicle unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Heretic Astartes model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warpsmith
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Heretic Astartes Vehicle units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Mechanisms
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Heretic Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enrage Machine Spirits
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Zealotry
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Dark Apostle model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Demagogue
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Heretic Astartes unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit’s Dark Apostle model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malign Sacrifice
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit contains one or more Dark Disciple models, you can select one of those models and one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. That Dark Disciple model is then destroyed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Faithful Flock
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Cult Demagogue model, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Ritual
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if this unit contains a Cult Demagogue model, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit can declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Veterans of the Long War
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: For the Dark Gods
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Howling Horde
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model from this unit was destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Despoilers
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warp-sighted Butcher
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If that unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

UnitAbilities.Title: Trophy Taker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unholy Bloodshed
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chosen Marauders
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Soul Eater
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more attacks made by this model this phase destroyed one or more enemy units, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's weapons.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outmanoeuvre
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge mode this turn, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1.

Options: plasma gun and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Fearsome (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terrifying Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warp Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Stabilisation Talons
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a ranged weapon, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and any or all modifiers to the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that weapon.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warp Rift Firepower
UnitAbilities.Text: Warp Rift Firepower (Once per battle, per unit): In your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit's ranged attacks have [INDIRECT FIRE].

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Heretic Astartes Infantry models (excluding OBLITERATOR and Jump Pack models). Each Possessed, Mutilators and Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Annihilator
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Destructor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model targets an enemy Infantry unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Siege Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Ordnance
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Ascension (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both abilities conferred by that pact (instead of only one).

UnitAbilities.Title: Devoted to Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

UnitAbilities.Title: Airborne Predator
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Siege Crawler
UnitAbilities.Text: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this model's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Heretic Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator, Jump Pack, Mutilators, Obliterators or Possessed models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mind-breaking Mutations (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit (excluding Vehicle units) is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Plough Through the Enemy
UnitAbilities.Text: In the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, if this model destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malevolent Locus (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Heretic Astartes unit is within 9" of this Fortification, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malign Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol weapon, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unholy Mechanisms (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Daemon Vehicle unit is within 6" of this model, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reorder Reality
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit within 18" of this model targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, until the end of the phase, that enemy unit’s ranged weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Indentured Daemon Engines
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Daemon Vehicle units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Twisted Defence Force
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is within range of an objective, this unit has +1 Sv against ranged attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bestial Raiders
UnitAbilities.Text: If this unit starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up this unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brutal Example
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Traitor Enforcer model, you can target that unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit from your army with that Stratagem this turn. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mutated Bodyguard
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Traitor Ogryn model, Character models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fiery Faith
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Leadership tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cursed Flames
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cruel Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Piles in or Consolidates, each model in that unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

UnitAbilities.Title: Visions of Suffering (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

UnitAbilities.Title: Voice Eater
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) cannot be targeted with Stratagems while they are within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability (excluding Epic Heroes) can be attached to a Legionaries unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Headlong Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Architect of Ruin
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle, select one unit in your opponent’s army to be this model’s hated foe. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its hated foe, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s hated foe is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its hated foe.

UnitAbilities.Title: Crushing Charge
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll charge rolls made for this unit, and each time this unit makes a Charge move, select one enemy unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: FLESHMETAL WEAPONS
Infos.Text: Before selecting targets for this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scuttling Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonforge
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. In addition, once per battle, when this unit makes a Dark Pact, before making the resulting Leadership test, you can declare it will overcharge its daemonforge. If it does:
▪ If the resulting Leadership test is failed, this model suffers 3 mortal wounds instead of D3 mortal wounds.
▪ Until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: EMPYRIC WELLSPRING
Rule.Text:
In your Shooting phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker unit (excluding Daemon units) is selected to shoot, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit’s ranged attacks have +1 S.
▪ In the Fight phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Daemon Prince unit (excluding Khorne units) is selected to fight, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit’s melee attacks have: +2 S and +1 AP.

Stratagems.Name: Infernal Vigour
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker/Daemon unit (excluding Khorne units).
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit heals D3+1 wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Fleshy Curse
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Roll one D6:
▪ On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
▪ On a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
▪ On a 5-6, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds.
These mortal wounds are inflicted by a psychic attack.

Stratagems.Name: Wreathed in Warpflame
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

Enhancements.Name: Touched by the Warp
Enhancements.Description:
Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Khorne models).
▪ This model has Psyker.
▪ This model’s weapons have [PSYCHIC].

Enhancements.Name: Conduit of Chaos
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Daemon model only (excluding Khorne models). This model’s melee attacks have [LANCE].

Rule.Title: RAIN OF RUIN
Rule.Text: Friendly Havocs/Obliterators units’ ranged attacks have [HEAVY].

Stratagems.Name: Ruination’s Bounty
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Havocs/Obliterators unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Havocs/Obliterators unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
When your unit uses the Dark Pacts ability, your unit’s ranged attacks have:
▪ [LETHAL HITS].
▪ [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

Stratagems.Name: Snare of Fire
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Havocs unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Havocs unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

Stratagems.Name: Undying Hatred
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Havocs/Obliterators unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Havocs/Obliterators unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Pact of Destruction
Enhancements.Description:
Warpsmith model only.
▪ When this unit uses its Dark Pacts ability, this unit can re-roll Leadership rolls.
▪ In your Shooting phase, when this unit has shot, if this unit used its Dark Pacts ability and if those attacks destroyed an enemy model, this unit heals 3 wounds.

Enhancements.Name: Eye of Oblivion
Enhancements.Description: Warpsmith model only. When this unit is selected to shoot, select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until this unit has shot.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the NIGHTMARE tag and cannot be taken with another NIGHTMARE detachment.
Rule.Title: PREY ON THE WEAK
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly units’ attacks that target a battle-shocked unit or a unit at or below half-strength can re-roll hit rolls of 1.
▪ When an enemy unit’s attacks target a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit, if that enemy unit is battle-shocked or at or below half-strength, those attacks have -1 to hit rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Plunging Talons
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have [LANCE].

Stratagems.Name: Raking Pass
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Warp-twisted Terrors
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Warp Talons unit ends a move.
Stratagems.Target: That Warp Talons unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit (excluding Monster/Vehicle units) within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.

Enhancements.Name: Shadowcowl Talisman
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord With Jump Pack model only. This unit has 5+ InSv.

Enhancements.Name: Pact of Cursed Pinions
Enhancements.Description:
Chaos Lord With Jump Pack model only.
▪ This model has Daemon.
▪ This model’s melee attacks have +1 A.

Rule.Title: FOCUS OF HATRED
Rule.Text: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army (excluding Damned models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Endless Ire
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after your focus of hatred is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Character unit from your army (excluding Damned units).
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is considered to be your focus of hatred.

Stratagems.Name: Contemptuous Disregard
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Bringers of Despair
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that is within Engagement Range of your focus of hatred.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

Stratagems.Name: Black Crusade
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit or Heretic Astartes Mounted unit from your army (excluding Damned units).
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using that ability.

Stratagems.Name: Let the Galaxy Burn
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Tzeentch units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and change the Attacks characteristic of the Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit to 6.

Stratagems.Name: Millennia of Experience
Stratagems.Category: VETERANS OF THE LONG WAR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit or Heretic Astartes Mounted unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Enhancements.Name: Warmaster's Gift
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

Enhancements.Name: Eager for Vengeance
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, if the bearer’s unit Fell Back this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll, and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit’s charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

Enhancements.Name: Eye of Abaddon
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Mark of Legend
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

Rule.Title: MASTERS OF MISDIRECTION
Rule.Text:
In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select a number of Legionaries and Cultist Mob units from your army: until the end of the battle, those units, and any Character units attached to them (excluding Epic Heroes), have the Infiltrators ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

	▪ Incursion - Up to 2 Legionaries units - Up to 2 Cultist Mobs units
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 3 Legionaries units - Up to 3 Cultist Mobs units
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 4 Legionaries units - Up to 4 Cultist Mobs units

Stratagems.Name: Detonator
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding Titanic models) is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Character unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).

Stratagems.Name: From All Sides
Stratagems.When: Start of your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit for each other Heretic Astartes unit from your army that made a Charge move this phase (to a maximum of +3).

Stratagems.Name: Pick Them Off
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll  the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Coils of Deception
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic Astartes unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is elligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Relentless Pursuit
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry oF Heretic Astartes Mounted Unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Scrambled Coordinates
Stratagems.When: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent's Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.

Enhancements.Name: Falsehood
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Heretic Astartes Infantry units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves. If you do, in one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly Legionaries or Chosen unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed and the bearer is set up on the battlefield as close as possible to where that model was destroyed, not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and is no longer attached to its Bodyguard unit.

Enhancements.Name: Cursed Fang
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Shroud of Obfuscation
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Soul Link
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other Heretic Astartes Infantry Character model from ad army (excluding Epic Heroes). Until the start your next Command phase, the bearer gains the Psyker keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the Character you selected.

Rule.Title: RAIDERS AND REAVERS
Rule.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by Heretic Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Unfailingly Obdurate
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking units attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Scour and Seize
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Opportunistic Raiders
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal Move of up to 6", or up to 12" if it is a Mounted unit. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a Transport at the end of this move if it disembarked from a Transport this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Warpcharged Engines
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Transport or Heretic Astartes Mounted unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it, instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Ruinous Raid
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that disembarked from a Transport this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-toll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Reavers' Haste
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry OF Heretic Astartes Mounted unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If you select one or more units within range of an objective marker as a target of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

Enhancements.Name: Despot's Claim
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Dread Reaver
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Mark of the Hound
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Tyrant's Lash
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer’s unit, and the bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Rule.Title: IRON FORTITUDE
Rule.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets a Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Persistent Assailants
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks this phase and has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit is Below Half-strength you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Brutal Attrition
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack is allocated to your unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit siffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Pitiless Cannonade
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Haif-strength, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Point-Blank Destruction
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit's ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Steadfast Determination
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: Siegecraft
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

Enhancements.Name: Bastion Plate
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord model only (excluding Jump Pack models). Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Enhancements.Name: Warp Tracer
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

Enhancements.Name: Ironbound Enmity
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Iron Artifice
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only. The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

Rule.Restrictions:
▪ A Character/Epic Hero unit can only be attached to a unit if both units share the same keyword from the list above.
▪ A unit can only embark within (or start the battle embarked within) a Transport if both of those units share the same keyword from the list above.
Rule.Title: MARKS OF CHAOS
Rule.Text:
When mustering your army, each time you select a Heretic Astartes unit to include in your army, if that unit is not an Epic Hero and does not already have one of the following keywords, you must select one for that unit and note it on your Army Roster: Khorne, Tzeentch, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Chaos Undivided. Each time a unit with one of these keywords gains a weapon ability as the result of a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, until the end of the phase, that unit gains the associated ability below.

UNITS THAT GAINED [LETHAL HITS]
	▪ Khorne: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
	▪ Tzeentch: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
	▪ Chaos Undivided: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UNITS THAT GAINED [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
	▪ Nurgle: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ score a Critical Hit.
	▪ Slaanesh: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
	▪ Chaos Undivided: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Eye of the Gods
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after a Heretic Astartes Character unit from your army (excluding Damned, Daemon and Epic Hero units) destroys an enemy unit.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Character model in that unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Move Toughness and Wounds characteristics of that Character model, and add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of that Character model's melee weapons.

Stratagems.Name: Eternal Hate
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a Khorne unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Profane Zeal
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Chaos Undivided unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Skinshift
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit is a Tzeentch unit below its Starting Strength, one destroyed model (excluding Character models) is returned to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

Stratagems.Name: Torpefying Refrain
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a Slaanesh unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Festering Miasma
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. In addition, if your unit is a Nurgle unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Enhancements.Name: Talisman of Burning Blood
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Khorne model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3: until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: Eye of Tzeentch
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Tzeentch model only. Each time the bearer's unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Orbs of Unlife
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Nurgle model only. At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer's unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Enhancements.Name: Intoxicating Elixir
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Slaanesh model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer's unit shoots or fights, if the bearer's unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Rule.Title: DESPERATE DEVOTION
Rule.Text:
Each time a Damned unit from your army with the Dark Pacts ability is selected to make a Normal or Advance move or declare a charge (excluding units that arrived from Reserves this turn), it can make a Desperate Pact (see below). If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Charge rolls made for that unit.

DESPERATE PACTS
Each time a unit makes a Desperate Pact, it must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds before any effects of that Desperate Pact are resolved.

KEYWORDS
Traitor Guardsmen Squad units from your army gain the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Chosen for Glory
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact, if it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if you runit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Selfless Demise
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed roll one D6: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

Stratagems.Name: Internal Sacrifice
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (in addition to any suffered for failing the resulting Leadership test), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Crazed Focus
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your until makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact improve the strength characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Reckless Haste
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Mortal Thralls
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, and one friendly Damned unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, while your Damned unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack that targets your Heretic Astartes unit, if your Damned unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no roll is made; instead, your Damned unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Cultist's Brand
Enhancements.Description: Dark Apostle or Damned model only. If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is Damned, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

Enhancements.Name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
Enhancements.Description: Dark Apostle model only. In your COmmand phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed Damned models (excluding Character models) to the bearer's unit.

Enhancements.Name: Incendiary Goad
Enhancements.Description: Dark Apostle or Damned model only. While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Damned models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

Enhancements.Name: Warped Foresight
Enhancements.Description: Dark Apostle or Damned model only. While the bearer is leading a unit with the Scouts 6" ability, every model in the bearer’s unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

Rule.Title: DEBT TO THE SOUL FORGE
Rule.Text:
Each time a Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle unit from your army makes a Dark Pact, it can invoke its contract. If it does, subtract 1 from the resulting Leadership test when making that Dark Pact, and until the end of the phase:

	▪ Each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
	▪ Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Desperate Pledge
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if Your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack,  improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Glut of Souls
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: ona 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wounds).

Stratagems.Name: Daemonic Possession
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Vehicle unit from your army (excluding Daemon units).
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, your unit has the Daemon keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Unstoppable Rampage
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle or Vashtorr the Arkifane unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can  move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

Stratagems.Name: Predatory Pursuit
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle or Vashtorr the Arkifane unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Feeding Frenzy
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is selected to Fall Back.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle or Vashtorr the Arkifane unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that is within Engagement Range of your unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Enhancements.Name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
Enhancements.Description: Warpsmith model only. Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

Enhancements.Name: Tempting Addendum
Enhancements.Description:
Heretic Astartes model only. Each time a Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle unit from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:

	▪ If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
	▪ Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Forge's Blessing
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Heretic Astartes Vehicle unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Soul Harvester
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

Rule.Title: TERROR DESCENDS (AURA)
Rule.Text:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength  is within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

 Each time an enemy unit within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from the result.

 Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Depthless Cruelty
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Bloody Example
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after a Heretic Astartes unit from your army destroys a Character unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Each enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Pitiless Hunters
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Relentless Terror
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Screaming Descent
Stratagems.When: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Jump Pack unit from your army that is in Reserves.
Stratagems.Effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy Infantry or Mounted unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit makes a battle-shock roll.

Stratagems.Name: Merciless Pursuit
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase. When doing so, you can only select that enemy unit as the target of that charge (and only if it is an eligible target). Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Night's Shroud
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord model only (excluding Terminator models). Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

Enhancements.Name: Willbreaker
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Warp-Fuelled Thrusters
Enhancements.Description: Jump Pack Chaos Lord model only. At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Eater of Dread
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

Rule.Title: EXPERIMENTAL AUGMENTATIONS
Rule.Text:
At the start of the battle, select which augmentations are active for Heretic Astartes Infantry models (excluding Damned models) from your army until the end of the battle. To do so, either select one from the list below, or randomly determine two by rolling two D6. If Fabius Bile is your Warlord, when randomly determining your augmentations, you can re‑roll one or both of the dice. Duplicated augmentations have no additional effect.

Cholinergic Accelerants
Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

Hyperadrenal Infusion
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.

Paraneural Reactions
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

Supracutaneous Chitination
Improve the Toughness characteristic of this model by 1.

Macrotensile Sinews
Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

Ophthalmic Enhancement
Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Monstrous Visages
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Masters Are Watching
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a Damned unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Specimens For The Spider
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll. After your unit has fought, if one or more enemy Character models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. If the enemy Warlord was destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle‑shock test instead.

Stratagems.Name: Delayed Mutations
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit (excluding Damned units) from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations). Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the selected augmentation in addition to any other augmentations they have.

Stratagems.Name: Diabolic Regeneration
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit (excluding Damned units) from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: One destroyed model (excluding Character models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a Battleline unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding Character models) are returned to your unit instead.

Stratagems.Name: Autostimulants
Stratagems.Category: CREATIONS OF BILE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Enhancements.Name: Surgical Precision
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Living Carapace
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Helm of All-seeing
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only (excluding Damned models). Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Prime Test Subject
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Infantry model only (excluding Damned models). Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: TERROR MADE MANIFEST
Rule.Text:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result. Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

Each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Each time an attack targets a Heretic Astartes unit from your army, if the attacking model is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Talons Sunk Deep
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Prey on the Weak
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Sadistic Display
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after a Heretic Astartes unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of and visible to your unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Malicious Surge
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Relentless Terror
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Horrific Incursion
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Enhancements.Name: Greyveil Hex
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability. While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Enhancements.Name: Warp-Fuelled Thrusters
Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord Jump Pack model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Terrorglut Parasite
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Enhancements.Name: Sorrowscent Vulture
