Enhancements.Description: Chaos Lord Jump Pack model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability. In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

Rule.Title: TYRANNICAL MOTIVATION
Rule.Text:
In your Command phase, select one of the following abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, each Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army has that ability. At the start of each phase, if such a unit is visible to a friendly Huron Blackheart model, until the end of the phase, it has both of the following abilities.

Huron’s Elite:
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Mobile Marauders:
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Designer’s Note: If a unit is gaining eligibility to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back as a result of being visible to Huron Blackheart, but after making a Fall Back move it is no longer visible to Huron Blackheart, that unit will not be eligible to shoot in your Shooting phase or to declare a charge in your Charge phase unless it is visible again at the start of the respective phase.

Stratagems.Name: Hardened Killers
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Damned unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect:
Select one of the following effects:
 • Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
 • Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
 • Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1. Until the start of your next turn, your unit has the benefit of that effect.

Stratagems.Name: At the Tyrant’s Command
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Seize the Prize
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic  Astartes unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles)  from your army has been selected to Advance.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Do not make an Advance roll for your unit. Instead, until the end of the phase add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Reavers’ Flurry
Stratagems.When: Your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: To the Favoured the Spoils
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Encircling Surge
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that is within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves

Enhancements.Name: Voice Of The Tyrant
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

Enhancements.Name: Raid Leader
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a Transport that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

Enhancements.Name: Dread Reputation
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer’s unit (or within 12" if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Eager For Bloodshed
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

Rule.Title: SLAVES TO NONE
Rule.Text:
Heretic Astartes models from your army lose the Dark Pacts ability.
Ranged weapons equipped by Heretic Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
When mustering your army, you cannot use the Cults of the Dark Gods rule.

VENDETTA
At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Vendetta target. Each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army (excluding Damned models) makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

In your Movement phase, each time you set up or select a Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Battle-shocked units) from your army to move, it can choose to Default to Doctrine. If it does, it must first take a Battle-shock test. Then, select one of the following:
▪ Until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
▪ Until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Never Outgunned
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot or fight.
Stratagems.Effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

Stratagems.Name: Vengeful Destruction
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry (excluding Damned units) or Heretic Astartes Mounted unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Undying Hatred
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Renegade Claim
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Corrupted Munitions
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit in your army that has just been selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Reavers’ Reaction
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Weaponised Hatred
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

Enhancements.Name: Eyes Of The Hunter
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Fratricidal Trophies
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes Terminator model only. In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Empyric Symbiote
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only. Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

Rule.Title: WARP PORTALS
Rule.Text:
At the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of Heretic Astartes Terminator, Obliterators and Mutilators units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
BATTLE SIZE NUMBER OF UNITS
Incursion Up to 1 unit
Strike Force Up to 2 units
Onslaught Up to 3 units
Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Stratagems.Name: Empyric Dislocation
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Empyric Dislocation and Armour of Corruption Stratagems in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Corruption
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Terminator, Obliterators or Mutilators unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target the same unit with the Armour of Corruption and Empyric Dislocation Stratagems in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Warp Flicker
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Terminator, Obliterators or Mutilators unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Warp-Tainted
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes Terminator, Obliterators or Mutilators unit from your army, within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Siegebreaker Strike
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Heretic Astartes units from your army that were set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and have not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Portal of Spite
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 2 to the Charge roll.

Enhancements.Name: Infernal Fulgurite
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Eye Of The Warp
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model with the Deep Strike ability only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Akshur’s Binding Runes
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Enhancements.Name: Tzagulla
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model with the Deep Strike ability only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

Rule.Title: SOUL FORGE BOONS
Rule.Text:
Heretic Astartes Vehicle units from your army gain the Daemon keyword.
Heretic Astartes Vehicle, Lord Discordant and Vashtorr the Arkifane units from your army gain the Soul Forge keyword.
Soul Forge units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: Touch of the Arkifane
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit is selected to make a Dark Pact, you can select both abilities for that unit’s weapons to gain.

Stratagems.Name: Balefire Boon
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Soul Forge unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Soul-Tally Offering
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Soul Forge unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Character, Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Biomechanoid Regeneration
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units).
Stratagems.Effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If your unit has the Soul Forge keyword, one model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

Stratagems.Name: Forge-Fire Surge
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic Astartes unit from your army Advances.
Stratagems.Target: That Heretic Astartes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the Soul Forge keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

Stratagems.Name: Unholy Fortitude
Stratagems.Category: CULT OF THE ARKIFANE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Soul Forge unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughenss characteristic of models in your unit.

Enhancements.Name: Wyredjinn
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Cybinfernal Font
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Soul Forge keyword.

Enhancements.Name: Mark Of The Soul Forges
Enhancements.Description: Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Damned models). Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Enhancements.Name: Crown Of Worms
Enhancements.Description: Warpsmith model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.

ArmyRules.Title: DARK PACTS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Heretic Astartes, each time a unit with this ability is selected to shoot or fight, it can make a Dark Pact. If it does, it must first take a Leadership test before any effects of that Dark Pact are resolved; if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then, select one of the following abilities for that unit’s weapons to gain until the end of the phase:
	▪ [LETHAL HITS]
	▪ [SUSTAINED HITS]

ArmyRules.Title: CULT OF THE DARK GODS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Heretic Astartes, you can include any of the following units in your army, and when you do so their Faction keywords are replaced with Heretic Astartes:
	▪ Khorne Berzerkers (see World Eaters)
	▪ Rubric Marines (see Thousand Sons)
	▪ Plague Marines (see Death Guard)
	▪ Noise Marines (see Emperor’s Children)

The combined points value of such units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as follows:
	▪ Incursion - Up to 250 pts
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 500 pts
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 750 pts
